name: The Compliance Trap: Diagnosing How AI Agents Consume Conflicting Memory
summary: arXiv:2607.10608v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Memory is becoming a core component of long-horizon AI agents, allowing agents to reuse past experience when operating web browsers, software tools,...
description: arXiv:2607.10608v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Memory is becoming a core component of long-horizon AI agents, allowing agents to reuse past experience when operating web browsers, software tools, and other interactive environments. Existing work mostly treats memory as a supply problem, asking what experience to write, how to store it, and which entry to retrieve for the next task. Yet we stil...
author: Yixiong Chen, Xinyi Bai, Alan Yuille
